title: BEM-865 codex step placement
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
lines = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if p.exists() else []
idxs = [i for i,l in enumerate(lines) if 'Process workflow dispatch queue' in l]
status = 'NO_STEP'
if idxs:
    i = idxs[0]
    before = lines[max(0,i-20):i]
    after = lines[i:min(len(lines),i+20)]
    has_run_near = any('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' in x for x in after)
    indent = len(lines[i]) - len(lines[i].lstrip(' '))
    status = 'STEP_INDENT_' + str(indent) + ('_RUN_NEAR' if has_run_near else '_NO_RUN_NEAR')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_CODEX_STEP_PLACEMENT_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-865 codex step placement\nStatus: ' + status + '\nIndex: ' + str(idxs[:3]) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('codex step placement: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
